---
title: "Betulaceae (Birch family) — Tree families"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in Betulaceae (Birch family)

[Back to Tree Database](../index.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) | 3 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
